Aggregate module scores to the sample level

Source: R/stats_utils.R
aggregate_by_sample.Rd

Mean module score per sample (the pseudoreplication fix: test at the sample level, not the cell level), plus one label per sample for group_col when supplied (assumes group_col is constant within sample).

Usage

aggregate_by_sample(scores, sample_id, group_col = NULL)

Arguments

scores

A numeric vector of per-cell module scores.

sample_id

A grouping vector (sample id), same length as scores.

group_col

Optional categorical vector (e.g. diagnosis), same length as scores, assumed constant within each sample.

Value

A data.frame with one row per sample: sample, mean_score, and group if group_col was supplied.

On this page
